results.subject: [AINews] Open Models, Model Labs vs Agent Labs, and What's Untrainable — Sarah Guo
results.reason: Latent Space (swyx) AINews covering three fundamental AI industry topics: (1) open models ecosystem evolution, (2) the structural distinction between Model Labs and Agent Labs, and (3) Sarah Guo's perspective on what aspects of AI are untrainable. Sarah Guo is founder of Conviction, a leading AI-focused VC. Latent Space is one of the most important AI engineering newsletters. The Model Labs vs Agent Labs framing is a key industry structural insight for the wiki.

results.subject: Where AI is really taking jobs
results.reason: The Signal (Alex Banks) analysis of where AI is actually displacing jobs. Description: 'Stop guessing whether yours is next.' Relevant for AI's real-world economic impact — a recurring wiki topic covering workforce disruption, AI automation effects, and the gap between AI hype and actual job displacement patterns.
